releaseNotes:
• App renamed to Aria everywhere
• Background voice listening — like Google Assistant
• Auto notification when new version is available
• Selfie command: 'take selfie' or 'click selfie'
• Alarm command improved with multiple clock app fallbacks
• Firebase login now uses build-time key as fallback
• Google Sign-In shows clear explanation
• Settings reordered — Gemini key moved to bottom (optional)
• More Indian apps supported: Paytm, GPay, PhonePe, Swiggy, Zomato
• Play Store fallback when app not found
